# Optional (opt-in) framework skills
#
# A skill listed here is NOT vendored into a downstream repo by default.
# install.sh copies it ONLY when the downstream repo opts in by listing the skill
# (or its design-language name) under `.github/bubbles-project.yaml`
# `designLanguages.enabled`; otherwise install skips it, and prunes it if a prior
# opt-in was removed. `bubbles-drift-check.sh` treats a listed skill that is absent
# locally as legitimately opted-out (NOT a MISSING drift), and
# `generate-release-manifest.sh` records this set under the manifest's
# `optionalSkills` array so the trust model is opt-in-aware.
#
# Format per line: `<skill-dir-name> <enablement-token>` (whitespace-separated).
# A skill is ENABLED when the downstream `.github/bubbles-project.yaml`
# `designLanguages` block contains <enablement-token> (substring match — so either
# the friendly language alias `cinematic` or the full skill name matches).
# `#` comments and blank lines are ignored.
bubbles-cinematic-design cinematic
